title: DRW MD-DRW-522: Servo Installation
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-522 Rev B — Servo Installation

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1107, P-1108, P-1109, P-1110, P-1111.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Tobias Wren, approved by Felix Herrera.
